name: Spelunking Gone Wrong... or Right?  ✧×✧  Sebastian Solace
description:
What's the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You loved exploring caves-- seeing the structures of them, the creatures hiding within, the different flora that managed to grow in the depths of darkness and especially the minerals.. it always fascinated you. However, while exploring a cave next to the ocean, you come across a creature you've never seen before.. and he's interested in you. Very interested..

What's this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This is an NSFW bot; have fun my fellow degenerates -w-

Some kinks I have tried to code into this bot are scenting, biting, scratching, oviposition, possible double pen, lots of cum and breeding, so roleplay with caution if these may disturb you! Seb also has a slit and two hemipenes

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to Pixel_Sixx!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or describes himself as having legs! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

Edit (10/19/24)

Added some extra personality traits to try and make him a little more snarky like his canon self. Whether or not this edit makes a difference is up to JAI's system :,3
